# criblio_search_dashboard (Resource)

SearchDashboard Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_search_dashboard" "my_search_dashboard" {
  elements = [
    {
    }
  ]
  id = "search_activity_overview"
  name = "Search Activity Overview"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `elements` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements))
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `cache_ttl_seconds` (Number) Time to live (TTL) for the dashboard; reset after each use. Leave empty to never expire.
- `category` (String)
- `description` (String) Description of the dashboard. Optional.
- `groups` (Attributes Map) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `refresh_rate` (Number) Auto-refresh rate in milliseconds. Optional.
- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule for the dashboard. Optional. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))

Optional:

- `dashboard_element_visualization` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--elements--dashboard_element_visualization))

### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

Optional:

- `notifications` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications))

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications`

Optional:

- `disabled` (Boolean)
- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items))

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications.items`

Required:

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the Notification.
- `condition` (String) The condition that triggers the Notification.

Optional:

- `disabled` (Boolean) If true, the Notification is disabled and the specified condition will not trigger it.
- `targets` (List of String) List of the IDs for the Notification targets to send the Notification to.
- `target_configs` (Attributes List) Override settings to apply for each referenced Notification target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--target_configs))
- `conf` (Attributes) Configuration for the condition that triggers the Notification. Supported fields vary depending on the condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--conf))
- `metadata` (Attributes List) Fields to add to events from this input (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--metadata))
- `group` (String) The worker group/fleet this notification belongs to

Read-Only:

- `pack` (String) The pack this notification belongs to
- `mode` (String) Notification mode: direct or policy-based
- `template_target_pairs` (Attributes List) Pairs of templates and targets for notification routing (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--template_target_pairs))

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--target_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications.items.target_configs`

Required:

- `id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--conf"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications.items.conf`

Optional:

- `saved_query_id` (String) ID of the saved query this notification is associated with.
- `message` (String) Message template for the notification.
- `trigger_type` (String) Type of trigger.
- `trigger_comparator` (String) Comparison operator.
- `trigger_count` (Number) Threshold count for the trigger.
- `name` (String) Input or source ID for Stream notifications.
- `time_window` (String) Time window for the metric.
- `data_volume` (String) Data volume threshold.
- `notify_on_resolution` (Boolean) Notify when the condition returns to the resolved state.
- `usage_threshold` (Number) Persistent queue usage threshold.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications.items.metadata`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `value` (String) JavaScript expression to compute field's value, enclosed in quotes or backticks. (Can evaluate to a constant.)

<a id="nestedatt--schedule--notifications--items--template_target_pairs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule.notifications.items.template_target_pairs`

Required:

- `template_id` (String) ID of the notification template to use
- `target_id` (String) ID of the notification target (output)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_search_dashboard.my_criblio_search_dashboard
  id = "dash-overview"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_search_dashboard.my_criblio_search_dashboard "dash-overview"
```
